_comment: DO NOT USE THIS FILE. Deploy is configured at the REPO ROOT (d:/spl/vercel.json). This file is kept only as documentation. If Vercel picks up this file instead, it means your Vercel project Root Directory is set to django_backend/ — change it to blank (repo root) in Vercel dashboard.
_instructions: Vercel Dashboard → Project → Settings → General → Root Directory → clear the field (leave blank = repo root)
